# Update navigation

Please can you:

1. Review the navigation section in `/docs/mkdocs.yml`
2. Review the files in `/docs/docs/` and subdirectories
3. Update `/docs/mkdocs.yml` to align with your findings in 2
4. Update `index.md` files that link to files in their directory to ensure they link to the correct files
